title: b9283
description: cmake : add install() for impl libraries + fix apple builds ( #23511 ) pi : update ci : fix ios build ci : fix andoroid ci : fix apple builds cmake : add install() for impl libraries Add install(TARGETS LIBRARY) for all -impl libraries that were changed from STATIC to shared (controlled by BUILD_SHARED_LIBS) in commit bb28c1f . Without this, cmake --install fails to copy the shared libraries, causing runtime errors like: llama-server: error while loading shared libraries: libllama-server-impl.so
